content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative self-improvement framework can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid self-refinement framework that retains Self-Refine's zero-training, no-external-resource advantage while fixing its limitation of getting stuck in local optima from persistent single-perspective bias. This hybrid approach would allow LLMs to refine outputs through both iterative polishing and perspective shifting, without requiring any additional supervised training data or external tools.
